benefits.description: Zero discomfort from severe osteoarthritis in back for over a decade; arthritis has literally disappeared
Previously taking 1200mg ibuprofen daily for relief; hasn't taken 1 ibuprofen in the past month

protocol_notes: Also taking KLOW (unclear if this is a peptide or supplement). Severe back osteoarthritis for over a decade; orthopedic surgeon said nothing could be done except daily ibuprofen. Now pain-free.
